cards.rules_text:
Vigilance
Attacking Beasts you control have lifelink.
At the beginning of your end step, if you gained 5 or more life this turn, spread the Scourge. [i](Create a 2/2 green Beast creature token, or sacrifice a non-Beast creature to create a 3/3 token that's a copy of it, except it's a Beast.)[/i]

At the beginning of your precombat main phase, you may put a ritual counter on Altar of the Eclipse, then you may cast a legendary creature card with mana value X from your hand without paying its mana cost, where X is the number of ritual counter on Altar of the Eclipse.
Whenever you attack with three or more legendary creatures, draw a card.

Flying
[i]Insight[/i] — Whenever you draw your second card each turn, choose up to one target nonland permanent. Its owner puts that card on the top or bottom of their library.

Whenever a player casts a spell, you draw X cards, where X is that spell's mana value. Then if you have 14 or more cards in your hand, sacrifice Brain of Mensis.
If Brain of Mensis would leave the battlefield, instead exile it and your hand. Your maximum hand size is zero for the rest of the game.

Menace
When Ludwig enters, mill three cards. When you do, destroy up to one target creature with mana value less than or equal to the greatest mana value among cards in your graveyard.
When Ludwig dies, return him to the battlefield tapped and transformed.
cards.rules_text2:
Menace, lifelink
When Ludwig enters, you may return target Equipment card from your graveyard to the battlefield attached to him.
cards.flavor_text2: [i]“You were at my side, all along. My true mentor ... my guiding moonlight.”[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Flying, deathtouch
Whenever Mergo's Wet Nurse attacks, return target creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped and attacking with a finality counter on it. It gains indestructible for as long as you control Mergo's Wet Nurse.

Haste
{1}{G}: Target creature blocks Father Gascoigne this turn if able.
Whenever Father Gascoigne survives damage, exile him, then return him to the battlefield transformed.
cards.rules_text2:
Trample, haste
When Blood-Drunk Gascoigne enters, he deals 2 damage to any target, then destroy up to one target artifact.
cards.flavor_text2: [i]“The sweet blood, ooh, it sings to me! It's enough to make a man sick.”[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Trample
Whenever Laurence enters or attacks or you cast a noncreature spell, Laurence deals 1 damage to each other creature, player, and planeswalker.
cards.flavor_text: [i]“So you're intent on hunting beasts? Indeed. It won't be long ...”[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Reach, challenge [i](This creature can't be blocked by more than one creature.)[/i]
Great Amygdala has hexproof unless a creature has dealt combat damage this turn.
cards.flavor_text:
[i]“Oh Amygdala! Oh Amygdala! Have mercy on the poor bastard.”
—Patches the Spider[/i]

cards.rules_text:
If an effect would create one or more creature tokens under your control, it creates twice that many of those tokens instead.
At the beginning of your upkeep, if Beasts you control have total power 40 or greater, target player loses the game.

Paleblood hunter [i](If the hunt has not begun, it starts at 1. It intensifies once on each of your turns when a creature dies. At 4, transcend the hunt.)[/i]
At the beginning of your upkeep, if you've transcended the hunt, exile all other creatures and each graveyard. Each opponent's life total becomes 4. This ability triggers only once.

Moon Presence enters tapped with six stun counters on it.
[i]Insight[/i] — Whenever you draw your second card each turn, if Moon Presence is tapped, untap it. Otherwise, shuffle, then exile the top six cards of your library. You may cast a card from among them without paying its mana cost.

Whenever The One Reborn attacks, you may exile a creature card from your graveyard. If you do, The One Reborn deals damage equal to that card's power to target creature defending player controls.
The One Reborn has all activated and triggered abilities of creature cards exiled with it.

Paleblood hunter [i](If the hunt has not begun, it starts at 1. It intensifies once on each of your turns when a creature dies. At 4, transcend the hunt.)[/i]
[+1]: Until end of turn, Lady Maria becomes a 3/3 Warrior creature with indestructible and haste. If you've transcended the hunt, she gains double strike until end of turn.
[-2]: Lady Maria deals 2 damage to any target and you gain 2 life. If you've transcended the hunt, instead Lady Maria deals 4 damage and you gain 4 life.
[-6]: Exile two target permanents.
cards.special_text:
Paleblood hunter [i](If the hunt has not begun, it starts at 1. It intensifies once on each of your turns when a creature dies. At 4, transcend the hunt.)[/i]
[+1]: Until end of turn, Lady Maria becomes a 3/3 Warrior creature with indestructible and haste. If you've transcended the hunt, she gains double strike until end of turn.
[-2]: Lady Maria deals 2 damage to any target and you gain 2 life. If you've transcended the hunt, instead Lady Maria deals 4 damage and you gain 4 life.
[-6]: Exile two target permanents.

Paleblood hunter [i](If the hunt has not begun, it starts at 1. It intensifies once on each of your turns when a creature dies. At 4, transcend the hunt.)[/i]
When Simon enters, exile target creature an opponent controls until Simon leaves the battlefield.
Simon gets +2/+1 and has indestructible as long as you've transcended the hunt.

Whenever another creature you control enters, you gain 1 life. If you've transcended the hunt, put a +1/+1 counter on White Church Hunter.

Lure [i](This creature must be blocked if able.)[/i]
{1}{W}, Exile Wandering Nightmare from your graveyard: Target Equipment you control gains “Equipped creature gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control” for as long as this card remains exiled. Activate only as a sorcery.

{T}, Sacrifice another creature: Return target creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped with a finality counter on it.
{3}{W}, Sacrifice a creature: Return Annalise from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

Look at the top six cards of your library. Put up to two creature cards with mana value 2 or less from among them onto the battlefield and arm them. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. [i](Create a colorless Equipment artifact token with “Equipped creature gets +1/+0” and equip {2} attached to it.)[/i]

Each player chooses a creature they control, then sacrifices the rest.
Search your library for an Equipment card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It gains flying until end of turn.

cards.rules_text:
Whenever an opponent casts their first noncreature spell each turn, if that spell targets you or a permanent you control, counter it.
Each instant and each sorcery card you own has madness. The madness cost is equal to its mana cost. [i](If you discard a card with madness, discard it into exile. When you do, cast it for its madness cost or put it into your graveyard.)[/i]

[i]Insight[/i] — Whenever you draw your second card each turn, draw two cards, then discard two cards.
At the beginning of your end step, if you drew seven or more cards this turn, you may put a permanent card from your hand onto the battlefield.

Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, create a Blood Vial token. [i](It's an artifact with “{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this, Discard a card or sacrifice another untargeted permanent: Draw a card.”)[/i]
{2}, Sacrifice four Blood Vials: Look at the top four cards of your library. Put two of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard.

Exile up to one target spell or ability, up to one target creature you control, and up to one target creature you don't control. Return each creature card exiled from the battlefield this way to the battlefield under its owner's control at the beginning of the next end step.
Draw X cards, then discard two cards. For each nonland card discarded this way, create a 1/1 green and blue Alien Horror creature token.
